use_codes.desc: REDUCTION OF HETEROTOPIC OSSIFICATION IN PATIENTS WITH FIBRODYSPLASIA (MYOSITIS) OSSIFICANS PROGRESSIVA
REDUCTION OF HETEROTOPIC OSSIFICATION IN PATIENTS WITH FIBRODYSPLASIA OSSIFICANS (MYOSITIS) PROGRESSIVA
REDUCTION OF HETEROTOPIC OSSIFICATION IN PATIENTS WITH FIBRODYSPLASIS (MYOSITIS) OSSIFICANS PROGRESSIVA

indications.text:
SOHONOS is indicated for the reduction in volume of new heterotopic ossification in adults and
pediatric patients aged 8 years and older for females and 10 years and older for males with
fibrodysplasia ossificans progressiva (FOP).

SOHONOS is indicated for the reduction in volume of new heterotopic ossification in adults and
pediatric patients aged 8 years and older for females and 10 years and older for males with
fibrodysplasia ossificans progressiva (FOP).
